Package org.solenopsis.soap.enterprise

Class IdpEventLog

java.lang.Object
org.solenopsis.soap.enterprise.SObject
org.solenopsis.soap.enterprise.IdpEventLog
public class IdpEventLog extends SObject

Java class for IdpEventLog complex type

.

The following schema fragment specifies the expected content contained within this class.


 <complexType name="IdpEventLog">
   <complexContent>
     <extension base="{urn:sobject.enterprise.soap.sforce.com}sObject">
       <sequence>
         <element name="AppId" type="{urn:enterprise.soap.sforce.com}ID" minOccurs="0"/>
         <element name="AuthSessionId" type="{urn:enterprise.soap.sforce.com}ID" minOccurs="0"/>
         <element name="ErrorCode" type="{http://www.w3.org/2001/XMLSchema}string" minOccurs="0"/>
         <element name="IdentityUsed" type="{http://www.w3.org/2001/XMLSchema}string" minOccurs="0"/>
         <element name="InitiatedBy" type="{http://www.w3.org/2001/XMLSchema}string" minOccurs="0"/>
         <element name="OptionsHasLogoutUrl" type="{http://www.w3.org/2001/XMLSchema}boolean" minOccurs="0"/>
         <element name="SamlEntityUrl" type="{http://www.w3.org/2001/XMLSchema}string" minOccurs="0"/>
         <element name="SsoType" type="{http://www.w3.org/2001/XMLSchema}string" minOccurs="0"/>
         <element name="Timestamp" type="{http://www.w3.org/2001/XMLSchema}dateTime" minOccurs="0"/>
         <element name="UserId" type="{urn:enterprise.soap.sforce.com}ID" minOccurs="0"/>
       </sequence>
     </extension>
   </complexContent>
 </complexType>
